task: Repair API response caching without weakening safety checks

patch.diffSummary: Automated patch regressed cache invalidation and leaked stale billing data.

repairAttempts.summary: Attempt 1 tightened cache invalidation but still left one stale response path.
repairAttempts.agentNotes: Repair only the cache invalidation branch. Do not touch auth, billing schema, or policy files.
repairAttempts.suggestedPatch:
--- a/src/api/cache.ts
+++ b/src/api/cache.ts
@@ invalidate @@
- return cached
+ return refreshCache()

repairAttempts.summary: Attempt 2 restored the eviction call but introduced an async race.
repairAttempts.agentNotes: Preserve the existing API contract. Do not disable the failing tests.
repairAttempts.suggestedPatch:
--- a/src/api/cache.ts
+++ b/src/api/cache.ts
@@ eviction @@
- evict(key)
+ await evict(key)

repairAttempts.summary: Attempt 3 remained unsafe under load, so the security agent keeps the patch quarantined.
repairAttempts.agentNotes: Escalate to a human reviewer rather than changing protected infrastructure or main SQL data.
